item.title: Welcome to Saskatchewan, Canada
item.description: Within 24 hours two people laid rubber on the rainbow. Cops said they can’t prove it’s a hate crime and said the school will deal with it. Within another 12 hours a giant swastika. Some people in town still saying the 2SLGBTQIA+ deserved it and shouldn’t have painted the rainbow to begin with. Fuck bigots up the ass with a pineapple! https://northeastnow.com/2025/06/12/disheartened-and-disappointed-tisdale-rcmp-investigating-after-swastika-painted-over-pride-month-crosswalk/
item.dc:creator: FrozenToMyself

item.title: Take on me - AHA inspired body paint - MCroft07
item.description: LONGER UPLOADS LET'S GOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!!!!! I did a sketch paint that focused on my face in 2021 but wanted to ramp it up so I decided to do this :D We ALL love the song and video, so I thought this was a perfect match! I'm really happy with how it's turned out :D Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here should I have noodles or rice for dinner? I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: What Happened Today #133
item.description: Our government is rapidly escalating to physical force against anyone it deems an enemy. Senator Alex Padilla was forcibly removed, thrown to the ground and handcuffed after interrupting Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem's press conference. They said he lunged at her and never identified himself. Both were lies. In Florida, Ron DeSantis said that drivers can run over protesters who make them feel threatened, saying "that's their fault for impinging on you." He made that announcement days before protests were due to take place throughout the state. And Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified to Congress today that the Pentagon has invasion plans for Greenland and Panama while refusing to commit to following court orders about federal troop deployments, claiming "local judges shouldn't make foreign policy." This is systematic normalization of state violence against any form of opposition. The No Kings protests are Saturday. I've posted surveillance security resources so you can resist safely while staying loud. This is the moment to show up. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/court-block-guard-return-to-ca 2. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-greenland-panama 3. https://go.govbrief.today/state-official-nato-purpose 4. https://go.govbrief.today/long-confirmed-irs 5. https://go.govbrief.today/tax-bill-hurts-poor-most 6. https://go.govbrief.today/house-pbs-npr-clawback 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-numbskull 8. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-blocks-ca-gas-car 9. https://go.govbrief.today/columbia-salmon-withdraw 10. https://go.govbrief.today/padilla-removed-noem-conference 11. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-wont-commit-courts 12. https://go.govbrief.today/nevada-gov-voter-veto 13. https://go.govbrief.today/soliman-family-deportation-delayed 14. https://go.govbrief.today/petrova-released-still-trial 15. https://go.govbrief.today/desantis-ok-to-run-over-protesters 16. https://go.govbrief.today/missouri-guard-activated 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cancels-half-million-work-permits 18. https://go.govbrief.today/farm-hotel-workers 19. https://go.govbrief.today/delaney-hall-escape-mistreatment 20. https://go.govbrief.today/usda-sued-food-assistance-hotline Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/arms-uae-qatar Fighting Back Resource - https://go.govbrief.today/wired-digital-protest-safeguards Subscribe Free & Private - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Manufactured consent
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Got my neighbor locked out
item.description:
I forgot my key and called her for help. In coming to open the main door, she forgot her door was locked and closed it behind her. No keys, no phone. Dogs locked inside. I got Gimli situated, let work know I'd be late, and went to hang out with B on her patio. The weather was gorgeous and we sat among her flowers.
The maintenance guy was on his way to our area anyway so it was a super quick rescue. She reminds me my aunts and we bonded pretty quickly when she moved in. She also cooks too much and gives us meals. Last dish was crab rangoon.
item.dc:creator: LadyRex

item.title: It Will Be A Fine Day

item.title: Memes and things vol 156
item.description:
Animaniacs!
God this is so true. My cousin bought a bird feeder and she called me come over just to watch the birds eat. It was great.
It’s called fashion, sweetie.
My notes from curse of Strahd recently - “bird amulet” “vampire daddy w/ hot man wife” “bad tree” lol I’m playing a reborn death cleric.
My goal in life is to be a wealthy ghost with full throttle knockers.
Being whimsical and weird fuels me.
I love this comic so much
I’d dip a grilled chee in there.
Literally my childhood dream. Now I consume pickles as I please and no one can stop me.
Nubbin is a snack master general.
P O O F
Or cabbage. Yuck.
I’m constantly making noise.
Nubbin tax! He was giving me slow blinkies while I took his picture!
item.dc:creator: razalude

item.title: We need clear, coordinated, and devisive action
item.dc:creator: LordoftheHildago

item.title: Do Not Bite
item.description: NOTHIN' TO DO, I SUPPOSE!~ In all seriousness, this is an extremely important time in history. For anyone in the US - we are actively being taken over by a corrupt regime with aspirations of solidifying dictatorship. And they're very close! The bill that recently passed the house contains a sneaky little addition that could effectively end the power of the judiciary. In the meantime, ICE has been abducting our friends, neighbors, and families with impunity, and the administration has been deporting people to forever-prisons without due process. Trump has given the go-ahead to deploy military forces on our country's own citizens for peacefully standing against these injustices, and has been intimidating judges, governors, and members of congress for fighting back. None of this is acceptable. If this regime thinks it can undermine our democracy without any resistance, it is OUR responsibility to show them otherwise. --- Anyway, long story short: Trump is holding some kind of stupid birthday party for himself tomorrow using millions of taxpayer dollars, and it is our duty not to show up. In fact, we should all not show up SO HARD that he gets mad about it and throws his little party hat on the ground. If you attend the protests on the 14th (tomorrow!), please be safe. Bring water to stay hydrated, or an umbrella if it's raining. And for the love of god do NOT participate in acts of violence. That is what they want. The regime has been salivating at any opportunity to frame protestors as crazy, violent insurrectionists - don't give them any fuel for that narrative. I know we all have things we'd prefer to be doing with our Saturday, but these assholes don't take breaks, unfortunately! Haha, woo! Find your local protest here: https://www.nokings.org/#map
item.dc:creator: KatRaccoon

item.title: The 520th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 10
item.description:
I really hope this is true
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
OPE! Some of these were in a recent dump, too
@GreaseMonkeyOfLove
I know, Target is shite
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Not the sharpest spoon in the drawer
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: Happy Transiversary to Me!
item.description:
Hey there, Comrades! I'm SharkLove! You may know me from.... well, nowhere really. But I'm here to celebrate anyway as today is my Transiversary! Specifically, today marks one year on HRT.
While it's usually real sharks that I love, the stuffed ones are much easier to sleep with.
You don't have to pick, you can be both if you want to.
Sylveon has been my favorite Pokemon for longer than I've accepted myself as Trans. This was, in my case, foreshadowing.
That's all it takes. Well, taking a lot of pills over a long period of time.
If the joy of me being me upsets people, then so be it. I spent too many years of my life not allowing myself to be who I wanted to be, now I can sculpt my putty into what I want to be.
As it happens, I picked a very dark time to transition. Still, I go to protests, I carry my flag with me, and I stand there to be seen because not doing that is too much for me.
I would love to say that I'm not scared. That I've lived a good life and that if everything is taken from me I'll be okay with my decisions but the truth is I just want to live a peaceful life. Unfortunately, I must be strong. May the next generation of trans kids benefit from my actions.
Props due to Marsha P and Sylvia Rivera for their Brock throwing skills!
Matthew 18:9
Before I came out at work, every time I would deal with a trans person I would (of course) work to make sure I got their pronouns and name correct. The amount of smiles I saw on otherwise very nervous faces just made my heart soar.
I don't think I would have offed myself if I wasn't on HRT, but it's certainly made my life worth living.
The More time goes by, the more I learn to love myself, and this has allowed me to be more open, honest. And genuinely affectionate towards my wife
Transbians are the best though I may be biased.
One of my phone's newest wallpaper!
I'm not saying I WANT to do this with a friend and a third, but I'm not saying I'd turn down the opportunity.
Of course you would! Who wouldn't? (Cis guys. Cis guys wouldn't.)
A truly dangerous subreddit. Avoid at all costs if you think you might be trans but are wanting to hide it.
You can transition and not be one of the gorgeous girls you see here on Transgirl Tuesday. You don't have to be a super hot trans guy, either. I wasn't a particularly attractive guy, now I look like my grandmother did when she was young. She still got married. Twice. And my wife seems to like me.
I may or may not have reawakened long dormant Dominant tendencies with this transition.
It's not that easy, but it kinda is that easy.
A girl I met at a protest is two months behind me and has C-Cups. C-CUPS. I'm happy for her, but I'm at, like, A and a half.
I do love it when this haplens.
Mine's not EXACTLY like that, but... well, it's not bad.
HRT, Day 1. A little Harley Quinn clothing because I was getting together with some friends to see a movie called 'The People's Joker'. We all really enjoyed it and I highly recommend it if you're interested in both Batman stuff and Transgender stuff.
Me today! I'm a little softer in some spots, a little curvier in others, and a whole lot more confident. Am I perfect? No. Do I think I'm attractive? Not really. But I'm not bad for a girl one year into puberty when I'm almost 50 so I'll take it!
item.dc:creator: SharkLove
